ddls:
CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "summons_number" TEXT /* Summons number assigned to the violation */,
  "plate_id" TEXT /* Plate ID of the vehicle involved */,
  "registration_state" TEXT /* Registration state of the vehicle */,
  "plate_type" TEXT /* Type of plate (e.g., PAS, COM, OMT) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the violation was issued */,
  "violation_code" INTEGER /* Code of the violation */,
  "vehicle_body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the vehicle (e.g., 4D, VAN, SUBN) */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who issued the violation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the violation occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the violation (e.g., issued, paid, appealed) */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera that captured the violation */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image captured by the camera */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video captured by the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_violation_code FOREIGN KEY ("violation_code") REFERENCES violation_codes ("violation_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES violation_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer (e.g., Captain, Lieutenant, Sergeant) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit the officer belongs to (e.g., Traffic Enforcement, Parking Enforcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., intersection, street, highway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_codes" (
  "violation_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Fine amount associated with the violation */,
  "points_assessed" INTEGER /* Number of points assessed for the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "plate_id" TEXT /* Plate ID of the vehicle */,
  "registration_state" TEXT /* Registration state of the vehicle */,
  "plate_type" TEXT /* Type of plate (e.g., PAS, COM, OMT) */,
  "vehicle_body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the vehicle (e.g., 4D, VAN, SUBN) */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES vehicle_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the vehicle owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vehicle owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the vehicle owner resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle owner resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the vehicle owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vehicle owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vehicle owner */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the vehicle owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_fine_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check, online) */,
  "payment_confirmation_number" TEXT /* Confirmation number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violation_fine_payments_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_appeals" (
  "appeal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appeal */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation being appealed */,
  "appeal_date" TEXT /* Date the appeal was filed */,
  "appeal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appeal */,
  "appeal_status" TEXT /* Status of the appeal (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "appeal_decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the appeal (e.g., upheld, overturned, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appeal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violation_appeals_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, clerk, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES officers ("department")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the camera is installed */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of camera (e.g., speed camera, red-light camera) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the camera was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cameras_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
